Create AI Videos & Images
with 100+ Free Tools
Access the best AI models for video and images in one platform. Start creating in seconds. Free to try, no sign up, nothing to install.

No credit card required

AI Image Editor

The Complete AI Video Generator & Image Editor Platform
Generate, edit, upscale, animate, and work from templates: everything you'd usually split across several apps, plus face swap, lip sync, and talking photos built for real projects. One account instead of five subscriptions. Free daily credits; no credit card or download.
Face Swap
Replace faces in videos, photos, and GIFs with a single reference image. Realistic skin-tone matching, expression tracking, and multi-person support.
Image to Video
Animate any still image with AI. Upload a photo and add cinematic camera motion, ideal for product ads, social posts, and bringing artwork to life.
AI Image Editor
Edit photos with natural-language prompts. Remove objects, swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, and apply creative effects, no Photoshop needed.
Talking Photo
Make any portrait talk. Upload a face and an audio clip, and the AI generates a video with synchronized lip movements and natural expressions.
Text to Video
Describe a scene and watch it come to life. Converts text prompts into high-quality video clips with customizable aspect ratios and visual styles.
Lip Sync
Sync any face to any audio in any language. Dub content without reshoots, localize videos in minutes, and create viral lip-sync clips.
AI Video Generator
Your hub for every AI video tool: text-to-video, image-to-video, face swap, animation, and more. One place to generate any type of video.
AI Image Generator
Generate original images from text across 400+ styles. Product shots, illustrations, anime, concept art, and social graphics in seconds.
AI Clothes Changer
Virtually try on outfits with AI. Upload a photo and swap clothing styles, great for e-commerce visualization and fashion content.
AI Image Upscaler
Sharpen blurry photos, increase resolution up to 4×, restore old pictures, and add realistic detail, all without losing quality.
AI Headshot Generator
Professional AI headshots from a single selfie. Studio-quality portraits for LinkedIn, team pages, and marketing materials.
AI GIF Generator
Create custom GIFs from text prompts or images. Perfect for memes, reactions, and social media. Generate and share in seconds.
Who Uses Magic Hour
Ship ads, social clips, and product visuals from one account. Skip the tab shuffle and paying for five separate AI subscriptions.
Content Creators
Create viral face swap videos, AI-generated clips for TikTok and YouTube Shorts, talking photo content, and custom GIFs. Professional-quality content, accessible to every creator.
Marketing Teams
Scale ad campaigns with image-to-video product demos, A/B test visual assets, and localize content across languages using lip sync and AI voice tools.
E-Commerce Brands
Generate product photography with the AI image generator, swap outfits with the AI clothes changer, and produce video ads, all without a photoshoot.
Agencies & Studios
Build interactive campaigns with face swap at live events, personalize content at scale with the API, and deliver social-ready AI video in minutes.
Developers
Integrate face swap, image editing, lip sync, and more into your app with Magic Hour's REST API and official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust.
Educators & Students
Create explainer videos with text-to-video, animate diagrams with image-to-video, and produce educational content without expensive production tools.
Why Teams Pick Magic Hour Over a Stack of AI Apps
Run face swap, lip sync, talking photos, and the rest of your creative stack in one bill, with rollover credits and pricing that doesn't waste what you don't use.
One Plan, Every Tool
Video, images, editing, and templates under one login and one bill, instead of paying for a separate app for each job.
From Idea to Final File
Generate, edit, upscale, add voice, and browse 10,000+ templates in one workflow, without exporting between five different products to finish one asset.
Face Swap, Lip Sync & Talking Photos
Polished results for real social and ad content, not a gimmick bolt-on. Try face swap, lip sync, and talking photos on the free tier.
Try Free: No Sign Up Wall
Use daily credits before you create an account. Unusually generous free tier; paid plans stay strong value around $10–15/mo for serious volume.
Fair Credits, No Lock-In Waste
Credits roll over every month forever, return on errors and cancels, and you can cancel or downgrade anytime, with transparent pricing without use-it-or-lose-it traps. See plans.
Parallel Generations & Fast Iterations
Queue several renders at once without hidden concurrency limits, so you can try variations the way real production schedules demand.
Templates + One-Click Workflows
Click-to-create templates and chains that go from idea to polished asset without hopping between products.
Web, Mobile & API
Same capabilities in the browser, on the go, and in your product via our REST API and SDKs, documented and built to handle production traffic, not just demos.
Ships Weekly, Support That Replies
New models and features on a weekly cadence. Earn free credits when others use templates you publish. Y Combinator-backed, founder-led support that answers fast.
Frequently Asked Questions
What is Magic Hour?
Magic Hour is a free online AI video generator and AI image editor that helps creators, marketers, and developers produce professional-quality content in seconds. With 100+ AI-powered tools, including face swap, image-to-video, AI image editor, lip sync, and more. You can create studio-grade videos and images entirely in your browser.
Is Magic Hour free to use?
Yes. Magic Hour offers free daily credits that let you create AI videos and edit images at no cost. You can access popular tools like face swap, AI image editor, lip sync, talking photo, AI GIF generator, and AI image upscaler without a credit card. Paid plans are available for creators and teams who need higher volume or premium features.
How does the AI video generator work?
Magic Hour's AI video generator supports multiple workflows: type a text prompt to generate a video from scratch (text-to-video), upload a photo to animate it (image-to-video), restyle existing footage (video-to-video), or create stop-motion animations. Each tool runs entirely in your browser and most videos are ready within seconds.
Can I generate images with AI on Magic Hour?
Absolutely. Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts across a wide range of styles: photorealistic, illustration, anime, concept art, and more. You can also use the AI image editor to modify existing images using natural-language instructions.
How does the face swap video tool work?
Magic Hour's AI face swap lets you replace a face in any video with another face using just a single reference photo. The AI automatically handles alignment, skin tone matching, lighting, and expression tracking to produce realistic results. You can also swap faces in photos, GIFs, and multi-person group shots, all for free.
What AI tools does Magic Hour offer beyond video and image generation?
Beyond the AI video generator and AI image generator, Magic Hour includes: lip sync (sync any video with audio), talking photo (make still images speak), AI headshot generator, AI image upscaler, AI clothes changer, AI GIF generator, voice cloner, voice generator, and more: over 100 tools in total.
Does Magic Hour have an API for developers?
Yes. Magic Hour provides a REST API with official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust. You can programmatically generate videos, images, and audio, from face swaps and text-to-video to image upscaling and voice cloning. Usage-based pricing and a 99.9% uptime SLA make it production-ready at any scale.
Do I need to download any software to use Magic Hour?
No. Magic Hour runs entirely in your web browser. There is nothing to install or configure. Sign up, choose a tool, and start creating immediately. Your projects are saved in the cloud, so you can access them from any device.
What makes Magic Hour different from other AI video generators?
Magic Hour combines over 100 AI video, image, and audio tools in one unified platform. Most competitors offer only a handful. It's trusted by 3M+ creators and 2K+ teams, backed by Y Combinator, and used by businesses worldwide. With free daily credits, browser-based access, 10,000+ templates, and a production-ready API, Magic Hour is built for both casual creators and enterprise workflows.
Can I use Magic Hour for commercial projects?
Yes. Content you create with Magic Hour can be used in commercial projects, marketing campaigns, social media, advertisements, and more. Paid plans provide additional credits and premium features for professional and team use.
How does the AI image generator work?
Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts using state-of-the-art diffusion models. Describe what you want: a product photo, character illustration, social media graphic, or abstract artwork. The AI produces it in seconds. Choose from 400+ styles including photorealistic, anime, and concept art.
What is the best free AI photo editor online?
Magic Hour offers a free AI photo editor that lets you edit images using natural-language prompts instead of complex menus. Remove objects, swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, enhance skin detail, or add creative effects. It works on any device in your browser, requires no sign up to try, and is trusted by 3M+ creators worldwide.
Can I create AI videos from text prompts on Magic Hour?
Yes. Magic Hour's text-to-video AI generator converts written scene descriptions into polished video clips. Type a prompt and the AI produces a video in seconds. Beyond text-to-video, Magic Hour also supports image-to-video, face swap video, lip sync, and 100+ other AI video tools, all free to try with daily credits.
Have more questions? Visit our full FAQ or contact support.

Frequently Asked Questions
Are my generations private?

Yes, your generations are private from other users and Magic Hour. We will never access any of your assets without your explicit permission. You have the option to delete the generated asset after completion from our system. Make sure to download it first if you'd like to keep it, as it's deleted forever.

Assets that you upload to our platform, including images, audio, and videos are also private and are deleted within one week.

Can I use my plan for API access?
Yes, we offer API access for all users, with the same features and usage levels in your plan. Check out our API Documentation to learn more. If you need any help with implementation or have questions, please reach out to us on live chat or email us at support@magichour.ai. Our team is happy to assist you with your specific needs.
Do I own the assets I create?

Yes, you retain full ownership, including copyright and intellectual property rights, for all assets you generate. However, only paid users are granted commercial usage rights.

Free users may use generated content for personal, non-commercial purposes only.

Can I get a refund?
We offer a one-time refund if your purchase was made within the past 7 days and you have used fewer than 500 credits from the plan you purchased. Credits from free sign-up credits do not count toward this limit. If you have an issue with the product, please contact us in live chat or email us at support@magichour.ai, and we'd be happy to help you find a solution.
Do I need to enter a credit card to try Magic Hour?
No, Magic Hour's Free plan allows you to try our basic features for free. If you'd like to use features not included in the Free plan, or get more credits after you've run out, you can upgrade to a paid plan or purchase more credits.
Do credits roll over to the next month?
Yes, any unused credits in your balance will roll over to the next month, with no expiration. They are yours forever.
Do you offer enterprise pricing or plans for teams?
Yes, we offer customized pricing for enterprise customers or teams with large-scale needs. Please contact us at support@magichour.ai to discuss your requirements.
Does the pricing include tax?
Pricing excludes tax. If we legally need to collect tax, it will be added at the point of payment with Stripe. If we do not currently charge tax in your country or region, and in the future need to, then this will be added to your recurring bill at that time.
How do I cancel my subscription?
You can easily cancel your subscription any time in your My Plan page. After canceling, your subscription will end at the end of your billing cycle, and you will not be charged again.
How do I get more credits?

As a free user, you get an initial one-time 400 credits. Each day you visit the Create page, you can also claim an additional 100 free credits regardless of your plan.

As a paid subscriber, you receive a monthly credit allowance that gives you wider flexibility to use Magic Hour's premium features at your own pace. Importantly, these credits replenish at the beginning of each billing period and will never expire, so you can always save them for when your usage needs increase.

How do I remove watermarks?
You can remove watermarks by purchasing a subscription or credit pack.
What happens if I run out of credits in my paid plan?

When you run out of credits, you have three options:

You can wait for your next billing cycle to start. You can see when your next billing cycle starts in Next Invoice in My Plan.
You can purchase credit packs, which are one-time credit purchases in Pricing. This allows you to "top up" your plan whenever you run out.
You can start a new plan. If you switch from a monthly plan to an annual plan or vice-versa, the plan will start immediately. If you switch from a monthly plan to a different monthly plan or an annual plan to a different annual plan, your plan will start at the end of your billing cycle. However, if you want to start it immediately, you can click Upgrade Now in My Plan.
What happens to my credits if I downgrade my plan?
If you downgrade your plan, you will keep all the credits you have, but your monthly allowance will adjust to your new plan's limit at the start of your next billing cycle.
What payment methods do you accept?

We accept credit cards and debit cards worldwide, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, Diners Club, JCB, and China UnionPay.

We accept other payment options depending on your country and region, including:

Wallets: Apple Pay, Cash App Pay, Google Pay, Amazon Pay, Link, Alipay, WeChat Pay
Bank Redirects: Bancontact, EPS, giropay, iDEAL, Prszelewy24
Buy Now, Pay Later: Affirm, Afterpay/Clearpay, Klarna

We do not accept PayPal.

What support is included with my subscription?

All users have access to email and live chat support. Paid subscribers receive priority support, with responses typically within 3 hours during business hours (Pacific Time).

We aim to respond to all other requests within 24 hours. If there's a delay, we might be offline - thanks for your patience while we catch some sleep.

text:
Magic Hour
AI Video
AI Image
AI Audio

API

- It's Free
Home
Tools
AI Ugc Ad Generator
AI UGC Generator

Create AI UGC ads and UGC video ads in minutes - no creators or revision cycles. Scroll-stopping ads ready to use online.

Generate Your First UGC Ad
4.9/5 on Product Hunt
|
20M+ AI videos generated
|
500K+ creators in last 30 days
Trusted by teams at
How AI UGC Generator Works
Three simple steps to create AI UGC ads
1
Choose an actor
Upload your own actor or use one of our AI actors.
2
Generate first frame
Edit the first image of your video, including pose, background, and product.
3
Enter script and generate
Add the script you'd like to use, choose the duration, then click generate.
Generate Your First UGC Ad
AI UGC Generator Use Cases
See how our AI UGC generator can be used for UGC ads and video ads in different scenarios.
DTC product ads
Use an AI UGC ad generator to create direct-to-camera style ads for ecommerce products. Need face swap? Try our face swap video tool. Generate multiple hooks and angles without coordinating creators.
App install creatives
Use UGC-style ads to demo app features in a natural, testimonial format. Test different scripts and CTAs to improve install rates.
A/B testing variations
Use AI UGC ads to produce many variations quickly - different openings, benefits, and tones. For image variations, try our image to image generator. Find the best-performing message before you scale spend.
Localization at scale
Use UGC ads to localize the same concept into multiple languages and regions. Keep the structure while adapting phrasing and cultural context.
Seasonal promos
Use UGC ad generation to spin up holiday, sale, and event-specific creatives fast. Launch timely promos without a full production cycle.
Product feature launches
Use UGC-style clips to announce new features in a way that feels native to feeds. Create short updates for TikTok, Reels, and paid social.
Retargeting creatives
Use UGC ad variations to address objections and highlight proof for warm audiences. Create specific messages for retargeting and remarketing.
Why Creators Love AI UGC Generator
Create UGC ads and AI UGC video ads instantly - no creator outreach or revision cycles. Choose an actor, set the first frame, add a script, and render.
Stop waiting on creators and revisions
Ship concepts immediately instead of coordinating schedules and feedback loops.
Test more angles with less spend
Create many ad variations fast so you can iterate toward winners.
Update messaging without reshoots
Change scripts or visuals when offers and product details change.
Control the look from the first frame
Set the pose, background, and product so the output fits your brand.
Create ads that feel native to social
Generate short-form, scroll-stopping content designed for modern feeds.
Testimonials
Hear what our users have to say
"Magic Hour is the fastest way I've found to go from an idea to a polished image or video. It's simple, the results are consistent, and it's easy to iterate. It feels like a real creator tool."
Vishal Sankhat
Instagram Creator (534K followers)
"Magic Hour is a powerful AI tool for creating video, photo, and even voice content all in one place. Being able to generate videos up to 60 seconds from a single prompt is something most similar platforms still don't offer."
Daniel Davidson
Youtube Creator (194k subscribers)
"Magic Hour is one of the few AI tools I genuinely trust. Most tools are hit or miss, but Magic Hour feels reliable. I know what I'm going to get, which makes it easy to use regularly for social content."
Nasion Patriotik
Social Media Creator (1.8M followers)
"Most AI tools look impressive at first, but they're hard to rely on once you use them regularly. Magic Hour has been different for me. It's easy to use, the results are consistent, and I can get something polished without spending time fixing or redoing things. It fits naturally into how I create, which is why I keep coming back to it."
Lisa Li
Multimedia Designer at Rakuten Viki
AI UGC Generator Features
Create UGC-style ads and video ads without filming or actors
Create Winning Ads in Minutes
Create AI UGC ads and UGC video ads instantly - no waiting on creators or revision cycles. Test faster, scale creative, and beat your competition to market.
Unlimited Creative Testing
Test endless ad variations without creator fees or waiting. Find your winning creative fast and scale what works.
Launch Globally in 50+ Languages
Reach audiences anywhere with native voices and perfect lip-sync. Localize to every market without translation costs.
1,000+ Diverse AI Actors Ready to Perform
Choose from captivating AI actors that match your brand and audience. Find the perfect face for every campaign with emotion control and natural expressions.
Create UGC Ads Now
AI UGC Generator FAQ
Do I have commercial rights to use the generated videos?
Yes, paid subscriptions include full commercial usage rights. Use your videos on any platform: Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Google Ads, Amazon, without additional fees or attribution.
What is an AI UGC video generator?
An AI UGC video generator creates authentic user-style marketing videos using artificial intelligence and customizable avatars. You input a script, select an avatar, and generate professional UGC ads in minutes without cameras, actors, or editing skills.
How does this compare to hiring UGC creators?
AI generation is 10-20x faster and 5-10x cheaper than traditional creators who charge $100-500 per video with 1-2 week turnarounds, allowing you to generate unlimited variations in minutes for rapid testing and scaling.
What languages are supported?
We support 40+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Mandarin, Hindi, and Arabic. All avatars maintain natural lip-sync and pronunciation across every language.
Can AI avatars hold or demonstrate physical products?
Yes, avatars can physically hold items. To do this, include the product you'd like them to demonstrate in the first frame of the video. Our AI UGC Ads tool lets you upload an image of your product to create this image.
Can I edit videos after they're generated?
Yes, you can edit dialogue, music, and timing without using credits. Regenerating with a new script or avatar consumes a new video credit. You can also edit the video in editing software by downloading the video and uploading it into your video editor.
How long does it take to generate a video?
Most videos generate in 3-10 minutes depending on length and complexity. You'll receive a notification when your video is ready, and you can create multiple videos simultaneously.
What happens to unused credits each month?
Unused credits are yours and never expire. However, access to this tool is only available for users on a paid subscription.
What types of products work best with AI UGC ads?
E-commerce products, SaaS apps, digital services, supplements, beauty products, fashion, and online courses perform exceptionally well. Testimonials, product demos, and problem-solution narratives see the highest engagement and ROI.

How to use AI Ad Creative Generator
1
Upload your product image
Choose the product, person, or message you want to turn into ad concepts.
2
Describe your campaign
Add an optional prompt for audience, offer, visual style, platform, or brand direction.
3

Create a grid of ad concepts, compare options, and download the strongest creatives.
AI Ad Creative Generator Use Cases
Create ad concepts for social campaigns, ecommerce tests, landing pages, launches, and creative exploration.
Social ad testing
Generate multiple visual directions for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, and other paid social channels.
Ecommerce promotions
Turn one product photo into sale, feature, benefit, review, and lifestyle ad concepts.
Launch campaigns
Create quick creative options for product drops, announcements, events, and seasonal campaigns.
Founder and creator ads
Generate ad concepts around a person, message, offer, or creator-led campaign.
Creative brainstorming
Explore different angles, layouts, backgrounds, copy treatments, and visual hooks before committing to production.
Agency and marketing workflows
Produce first-pass creative directions for clients without starting every concept from scratch.
Why Creators Love AI Ad Creative Generator
Explore multiple campaign directions from a single product or subject photo — faster testing, platform-friendly formats, and lower creative cost before you commit to production.
One image, many concepts
Explore multiple campaign directions from a single product or subject photo.
Faster creative testing
Generate options quickly before spending time on manual design.
Platform-ready formats
Create square, vertical, and horizontal options for common ad placements.
Useful starting points
Get visual concepts you can refine, edit, or pass into your design workflow.
Lower creative cost
Test more ideas without booking another shoot or producing every mockup manually.
Testimonials
Hear what our users have to say
"Magic Hour is the fastest way I've found to go from an idea to a polished image or video. It's simple, the results are consistent, and it's easy to iterate. It feels like a real creator tool."
Vishal Sankhat
Instagram Creator (534K followers)
"Magic Hour is a powerful AI tool for creating video, photo, and even voice content all in one place. Being able to generate videos up to 60 seconds from a single prompt is something most similar platforms still don't offer."
Daniel Davidson
Youtube Creator (194k subscribers)
"Magic Hour is one of the few AI tools I genuinely trust. Most tools are hit or miss, but Magic Hour feels reliable. I know what I'm going to get, which makes it easy to use regularly for social content."
Nasion Patriotik
Social Media Creator (1.8M followers)
"Most AI tools look impressive at first, but they're hard to rely on once you use them regularly. Magic Hour has been different for me. It's easy to use, the results are consistent, and I can get something polished without spending time fixing or redoing things. It fits naturally into how I create, which is why I keep coming back to it."
Lisa Li
Multimedia Designer at Rakuten Viki
AI Ad Creative Generator Features
Generate multiple ad concepts from one image with AI.
Ad concept grids
Create several campaign directions in one generation.
Copy and layout awareness
Generate ad-style compositions with space for offers, product benefits, and campaign messaging.
Placement formats
Use common aspect ratios like 1:1, 9:16, and 16:9.
Product-to-ad workflow
Start with a product photo, then turn selected outputs into stronger ad creatives.
AI Ad Creative Generator FAQ
Is Magic Hour AI ad creative generator free?
Yes. You can try the free tool. Free usage may include daily limits, and paid plans provide higher limits and more features.
What does an AI ad creative generator do?
It turns a product, person, or message into multiple visual ad concepts that can be used for brainstorming, testing, and campaign development.
Can I generate ads from one product photo?
Yes. Upload one product image and generate a grid of different ad concepts, backgrounds, layouts, and creative directions.
Can I choose ad aspect ratios?
Yes. Use Auto to preserve the input format or choose common ad formats like 1:1, 9:16, and 16:9.
Does it create copy too?
The page should support ad-style visuals and optional campaign direction. If copy generation is included in the tool, expose it as an optional prompt or future advanced setting.
Can I use the outputs commercially?
Paid subscribers may use outputs commercially subject to plan terms and applicable law. Make sure you have rights to source images, products, brands, and people shown.
What images work best?
Clean product photos, clear subject images, and simple source visuals usually work best. Low-resolution or cluttered inputs may produce weaker ad concepts.
How is this different from Product Shots?
Product Shots focus on clean ecommerce or editorial product imagery. Ad Creatives focus on campaign concepts, layouts, offers, and performance creative exploration.

text:
Magic Hour
AI Video
AI Image
AI Audio
Pricing
API
Log In
Sign Up
- It's Free
Where Creativity Meets AI, Magic Happens
Contact Us
Our Mission

Magic Hour was born from a simple problem: video creation is hard, and most people never start. We wanted to change that.

The idea was inspired by helping my parents create videos for their hot pot business. Sometimes it took me up to a day to ideate, shoot, and edit a video. When tools like Stable Diffusion came out, I started hacking together ways to generate videos.

What began as a side project turned into something bigger. By posting videos from early versions of Magic Hour, we reached over 200 million people on social.

Our mission with Magic Hour is to take what we've experienced and give it to as many people as possible, so anyone can turn their ideas into economic opportunity.

Our Story

We met in 1997 in China when our moms, who were college roommates and are best friends, introduced us. Our families both immigrated to the US and ended up in Pennsylvania, where we spent time together growing up.

After college, David became a Software Engineer and Runbo became a Data Scientist. In 2023, Runbo asked David to help him productize his AI video prototypes, and soon, Magic Hour was born.

Magic Hour is born out of our experiences helping our parents market their small businesses, where we learned how difficult it is to create engaging video content, and our time in tech building apps for millions of creators, consumers, and gamers.

Want to work with us?

We'd love to hear from you!

Contact Us
Step Into the Magic
Generate Your First Video

og_data.title: AI Video Generator, Image Generator & Editor - 100+ Free Online AI Tools | Magic Hour
og_data.description: 100+ AI tools for video and images in one place: face swap, lip sync, talking photos, templates, generation, and editing. Credits roll over; refunds on errors. Try free without sign-up. Web, mobile, and API. Trusted by 3M+ creators.

twitter_data.creator: @magichourai
twitter_data.title: AI Video Generator, Image Generator & Editor - 100+ Free Online AI Tools | Magic Hour
twitter_data.description: 100+ AI tools for video and images in one place: face swap, lip sync, talking photos, templates, generation, and editing. Credits roll over; refunds on errors. Try free without sign-up. Web, mobile, and API. Trusted by 3M+ creators.

acceptedAnswer.text: Magic Hour is a free online AI video generator and AI image editor that helps creators, marketers, and developers produce professional-quality content in seconds. With 100+ AI-powered tools, including face swap, image-to-video, AI image editor, lip sync, and more, you can create studio-grade videos and images entirely in your browser.

mainEntity.name: Is Magic Hour free to use?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Magic Hour offers free daily credits that let you create AI videos and edit images at no cost. You can access popular tools like face swap, AI image editor, lip sync, talking photo, AI GIF generator, and AI image upscaler without a credit card. Paid plans are available for creators and teams who need higher volume or premium features.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI video generator work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Magic Hour's AI video generator supports multiple workflows: type a text prompt to generate a video from scratch (text-to-video), upload a photo to animate it (image-to-video), restyle existing footage (video-to-video), or create stop-motion animations. Each tool runs entirely in your browser and most videos are ready within seconds.

mainEntity.name: Can I generate images with AI on Magic Hour?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts across a wide range of styles: photorealistic, illustration, anime, concept art, and more. You can also use the AI image editor to modify existing images using natural-language instructions.

mainEntity.name: How does the face swap video tool work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Magic Hour's AI face swap lets you replace a face in any video with another face using just a single reference photo. The AI automatically handles alignment, skin tone matching, lighting, and expression tracking to produce realistic results. You can also swap faces in photos, GIFs, and multi-person group shots, all for free.

mainEntity.name: What AI tools does Magic Hour offer beyond video and image generation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Beyond the AI video generator and AI image generator, Magic Hour includes: lip sync (sync any video with audio), talking photo (make still images speak), AI headshot generator, AI image upscaler, AI clothes changer, AI GIF generator, voice cloner, voice generator, and more: over 100 tools in total.

mainEntity.name: Does Magic Hour have an API for developers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Magic Hour provides a REST API with official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust. You can programmatically generate videos, images, and audio, from face swaps and text-to-video to image upscaling and voice cloning. Usage-based pricing and a 99.9% uptime SLA make it production-ready at any scale.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to download any software to use Magic Hour?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Magic Hour runs entirely in your web browser. There is nothing to install or configure. Sign up, choose a tool, and start creating immediately. Your projects are saved in the cloud, so you can access them from any device.

mainEntity.name: What makes Magic Hour different from other AI video generators?

acceptedAnswer.text: Magic Hour combines over 100 AI video, image, and audio tools in one unified platform. Most competitors offer only a handful. It's trusted by 3M+ creators and 2K+ teams, backed by Y Combinator, and used by businesses worldwide. With free daily credits, browser-based access, 10,000+ templates, and a production-ready API, Magic Hour is built for both casual creators and enterprise workflows.

mainEntity.name: Can I use Magic Hour for commercial projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Content you create with Magic Hour can be used in commercial projects, marketing campaigns, social media, advertisements, and more. Paid plans provide additional credits and premium features for professional and team use.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI image generator work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts using state-of-the-art diffusion models. Describe what you want: a product photo, character illustration, social media graphic, or abstract artwork. The AI produces it in seconds. Choose from 400+ styles including photorealistic, anime, and concept art.

mainEntity.name: What is the best free AI photo editor online?

acceptedAnswer.text: Magic Hour offers a free AI photo editor that lets you edit images using natural-language prompts instead of complex menus. Remove objects, swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, enhance skin detail, or add creative effects. It works on any device in your browser, requires no sign up to try, and is trusted by 3M+ creators worldwide.

mainEntity.name: Can I create AI videos from text prompts on Magic Hour?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Magic Hour's text-to-video AI generator converts written scene descriptions into polished video clips. Type a prompt and the AI produces a video in seconds. Beyond text-to-video, Magic Hour also supports image-to-video, face swap video, lip sync, and 100+ other AI video tools, all free to try with daily credits.

visual_data.visual_style_notes: Dark, high-contrast AI SaaS aesthetic with a minimalist premium feel. The brand uses large expressive hero typography, lots of negative space, and a single vivid purple glow/CTA as the main visual anchor. Overall it feels futuristic, polished, and conversion-focused, with subtle gradients and soft lighting effects rather than heavy decoration.
visual_data.layout_style: Sparse landing-page structure with a top navigation bar, oversized right-aligned hero headline, centered primary CTA, and a dense multi-column footer/product directory. Secondary pages echo the same grid system and dark canvas, with cards and content bands floating in space and strong sectional separation.
visual_data.font_style: Modern sans-serif, bold and geometric for headlines with clean regular-weight supporting text.
visual_data.imagery_style: Mixed but mostly product/UI-driven and screenshot-heavy, with some AI-generated or illustrative thumbnail imagery embedded in cards and feature modules.
